title: ETC - Recover Ethereum Classic (ETC) sent to Ethereum (ETH) address

actions.value:
You can recover ETC sent to an Edge ETH address by importing your ETH private key into a newly created ETC wallet. 


1) Go to your Edge app and login

2) Then tap on your ETH wallet to go inside
3) Once inside of the wallet, tap on the gear icon (located on the upper right side of screen)

2) Tap Master Private Key and enter your password and the private key will be displayed. 

3) Go back to your main wallet screen and then tap the "+" or tap add wallets at the bottom and create an ETC wallet. 

4) Tap Import and then input your private key.

5) Once the wallet syncs you'll see your ETC balance and you can then send, receive. etc.

raw_title: ETC - Recover Ethereum Classic (ETC) sent to Ethereum (ETH) address
